tools.name: analyze_contract
tools.description: Upload and analyze a contract document for clause extraction, risk assessment, and key term identification. Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, and image formats with OCR. Returns structured analysis with identified risks and recommendations.

file_path.description: Local file path to contract document (PDF, DOCX, TXT, JPG, PNG). File must be < 50MB.

analysis_type.description: Type of analysis: full_extraction (all clauses), risk_assessment (risks only), commercial_summary (financial terms), legal_review (compliance check)

tools.name: search_contracts
tools.description: Semantic search across all contracts to find relevant agreements and specific clauses. Uses natural language query to find contracts by topic, clause type, or parties. Supports filtering and date-based search.

query.description: Natural language search query (e.g., 'termination for convenience clauses' or 'IP ownership provisions for custom development')

date_range.description: Optional: filter by signed date range

top_k.description: Number of results to return (default: 10, max: 50)

tools.name: get_risk_summary
tools.description: Comprehensive risk assessment for a deal including all associated contracts. Identifies problematic clauses, missing terms, legal risks with severity levels, and remediation recommendations.

deal_id.description: Deal identifier (aggregates all contracts in the deal)

focus_areas.description: Optional: focus on specific risk areas

tools.name: compare_clauses
tools.description: Compare specific clause types across multiple contracts to identify variations, inconsistencies, and anomalies. Helps ensure standardization across agreement portfolio.

clause_type.description: Type of clause to compare across contracts

contract_ids.description: List of contract IDs to compare (minimum 2, maximum 20)
